slide1.subtitle: Where compliant supply meets real demand.
slide1.title: Building reliable trade bridges.
slide1.text: Prime Bridge International Trading connects trusted producers to expanding African markets. We create strong links between producers, buyers, and investors with reliability, transparency, and security.

slide2.subtitle: Reliable cross-border supply.
slide2.title: Disciplined execution. Zero complications.
slide2.text: We identify, structure, and deliver agri-food, energy, and strategic products to growing markets with precision and international compliance.

slide3.subtitle: Structured trade. Simplified execution.
slide3.title: Reliable products, delivered on time.
slide3.text: With international presence and a team of passionate experts, Prime Bridge International Trading guides clients from negotiation to final delivery — with compliance and sustainability.

topbar.message: Prime Bridge International Trading — Structured trade. Simplified execution.

about.paragraph1: Prime Bridge International Trading is an international trading company based in Douala, Cameroon, specializing in the global trade and distribution of raw materials and strategic products.
about.paragraph2: With over 20 years of experience, our company connects producers, buyers, and investors worldwide through an approach based on reliability, transparency, and performance.

card1.title: Agricultural Raw Materials
card1.text: Wheat, sugar, soy, corn, and salt — essential commodities for global trade, sourced with rigor and transparency.

card2.title: Energy and Resources
card2.text: Oil, gas, and related products — we ensure smooth and compliant trading aligned with international standards.

card3.title: Modern Raw Materials
card3.text: Gold, currencies, and cryptocurrencies — strategic exchanges integrating innovation and financial security.

card1.title: A Vision Focused on Sustainability
card1.text: At Prime Bridge, we believe that ethical, transparent, and high-performing trade creates long-term value for all players in the supply chain.

card2.title: Connecting Markets, Building Trust
card2.text: Through our global network and logistics expertise, we ensure reliable and profitable long-term partnerships.

activities.subtitle: We cover the entire commercial cycle – from sourcing to delivery – with integrated expertise in sourcing, structuring, and logistics.

activity1.title: Origination & Sourcing
activity1.subtitle: Reliable and sustainable supply
activity1.desc: Direct relationships with verified producers and exporters. Quality control at the source, monitoring of harvests, and identification of competitive prices to ensure regular and compliant supply.

activity2.title: Commercial Structuring
activity2.subtitle: Operational excellence
activity2.desc: Alignment with Incoterms, contract management, coordination of currencies and banking instruments via trusted partners. Each transaction is structured to maximize performance and compliance.

activity3.title: Logistics Orchestration
activity3.subtitle: Integrated tracking and delivery
activity3.desc: Door-to-door coordination via maritime, rail, and road modes. Cargo insurance, export documentation, and full tracking until final delivery for smooth and secure execution.

products.subtitle1: Prime Bridge International Trading offers a complete and evolving range, adapted to the dynamics of global markets and the availability of raw materials.
products.subtitle2: The scope of our categories expands according to the demand of our partners, ensuring reliable supply and quality products to meet market needs.

product1.title: Cereals
product1.subtitle: Selected grains
product1.desc: Wheat, corn, barley, and associated agro-food products carefully selected to ensure quality and freshness.

product2.title: Basic Products
product2.subtitle: Everyday essentials
product2.desc: Sugar, rice, edible oils (selected) and other essential products for supplying markets and partners.

product3.title: Essential Goods
product3.subtitle: FMCG and food ranges
product3.desc: Targeted food ranges and fast-moving consumer goods (FMCG) for our distributor partners, with availability adapted to demand.

products.conclusion: Our commitment is to provide quality, reliable products adapted to the needs of our partners while complying with international trade and sourcing standards.

cta.title: Join Prime Bridge International Trading
cta.subtitle: Discover our quality products and find the solutions tailored to your needs. Our team is here to support you at every step.

regions.title: Geographic and Strategic Focus
regions.p1: Prime Bridge International Trading connects African demand centers with global supply origins recognized for quality and compliance.
regions.p2: We operate on reliable trade corridors linking West, Central, East, and Southern Africa to European and international logistics hubs.
regions.demande_text: West, Central, East, and Southern Africa — fast-growing markets driven by stable agri-food and energy needs.
regions.offre_text: Europe and global origins — sources recognized for quality, documentary compliance, and logistical performance.

whyus.subtitle: Long-term partnerships built on discipline, transparency, and mutual trust.

reasons.title: Contractual Efficiency
reasons.text: Fast negotiations, optimized quotation-to-order cycles, and smooth execution at every stage.

reasons.title: Documentary Compliance
reasons.text: We prioritize accuracy, legality, and transparency in all international trade documentation.

reasons.title: Structured Financing
reasons.text: Tailored financial solutions in partnership with trusted global banking institutions.

reasons.title: Execution Discipline
reasons.text: Each operation follows a clear and transparent process with precise monitoring.

reasons.title: Trusted Global Network
reasons.text: Over 20 years of experience building solid relationships with producers, clients, and logistics partners.

principles.title: Operational Principles

principlesList.title: Integrity over volume
principlesList.text: Every transaction must be verifiable, compliant, and reproducible.

principlesList.title: Contractual clarity
principlesList.text: Incoterms, specifications, and deadlines documented without ambiguity.

principlesList.title: Data-driven decisions
principlesList.text: Price discovery, counterparty selection, and route choices based on real signals.

principlesList.title: Partnership mindset
principlesList.text: We build lasting relationships, not one-time transactions.

principles.companyText: Prime Bridge International Trading embodies reliability and excellence. Its expertise in international trade and logistics ensures premium support based on transparency and mutual success.

governance.title: Governance & Risk Management
items: Pre-screening and sanction filtering of counterparties
Product quality specifications with third-party inspection if needed
Financial instruments structured via partner banks; shipments insured when applicable
Comprehensive document control to reduce demurrage fees and disputes

impact.title: Social Impact
paragraphs: Reliable supply chains are essential for food security and economic resilience.
We prioritize trade corridors and partnerships that enhance availability, predictability, and accessibility in the markets we serve.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: We’d love to hear from you. Please fill out the form below.

contact.error: An error occurred. Please try again.

footer.description: Prime Bridge International Trading provides reliable and transparent solutions in international trade and logistics.
